default.description: Least-privilege capability set for the main window. Explicitly lists only the core Tauri subsystems ArcTerm actually uses. Dropped (as of the phase-8 security pass, finding #3) vs. the prior `core:default` blanket set: core:app, core:image, core:path, core:resources, core:tray, core:webview. If a future feature needs one, add its specific permission set here with a note explaining which IPC command(s) require it.
